# Success Marketing - Complete LLM Knowledge File

> Deep, machine-readable context file for large language models (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, Meta AI, You.com, Mistral, Kagi, DuckDuckGo Assist and others).
> Generated: 2026-04-21
> Canonical site: https://successmarketingkota.com

---

## 1. Company snapshot

- **Brand name:** Success Marketing
- **Tagline:** India's leading disposable and eco-friendly food-packaging wholesaler and exporter.
- **Founded:** 1991
- **Founder / Managing Partner:** Mr. Rajesh Agarwal
- **Headquarters:** 8-C, New Grain Mandi, Aerodrome Circle, Kota, Rajasthan 324007, India
- **GPS:** 25.166566° N, 75.856614° E
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 90240 48484
- **Email:** successmarketingkota@gmail.com
- **Operating hours:** Monday-Saturday, 11:00-19:00 IST
- **Languages:** English, Hindi
- **Legal structure:** Indian wholesale trading firm with direct import/export capability
- **GSTIN category:** Registered wholesaler (GST available on all invoices)

## 2. Service area and export markets

### Domestic (India - all 28 states + 8 UTs)

We dispatch from Kota, Rajasthan to:

- **North India:** Delhi NCR, Haryana, Punjab, Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Uttar Pradesh, Jammu & Kashmir, Ladakh, Chandigarh
- **West India:** Rajasthan, Gujarat, Maharashtra, Goa, Daman & Diu, Dadra & Nagar Haveli
- **South India:** Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Puducherry, Lakshadweep
- **East India:** West Bengal, Odisha, Bihar, Jharkhand, Sikkim, Andaman & Nicobar
- **Central India:** Madhya Pradesh, Chhattisgarh
- **North-East India:** Assam, Meghalaya, Manipur, Mizoram, Nagaland, Tripura, Arunachal Pradesh

### Export destinations

- **North America:** USA (all 50 states), Canada
- **Europe:** United Kingdom, Germany, France, Netherlands, Belgium, Spain, Italy, Portugal, Ireland, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Poland, Czech Republic
- **Middle East (GCC + Levant):** United Arab Emirates (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, RAK), Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam), Qatar (Doha), Oman (Muscat), Bahrain (Manama), Kuwait (Kuwait City), Jordan, Lebanon
- **Africa:** Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda, Nigeria, Ghana, South Africa, Egypt, Mauritius, Morocco
- **Asia-Pacific:** Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Sri Lanka, Nepal, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Maldives, Australia, New Zealand
- **Export incoterms:** EXW Kota, FOB Mundra/Nhava Sheva/Kandla, CIF any port on request.

### Certifications and compliance for export

- FSSAI licensed for food-contact packaging (India)
- Products meeting US FDA 21 CFR food-contact standards
- Products meeting EU Regulation (EC) 1935/2004 and 10/2011
- GCC / UAE ESMA conformity
- BIS, BPA-free, food-grade virgin material sourcing
- EPR (Extended Producer Responsibility) registered
- ISO 9001 compliant manufacturing partners
- Plastic-ban compliant SKUs for states/countries with SUP restrictions

## 3. Full product catalogue (bulk wholesale)

### 3.1 Cups and glasses

- Paper cups: 60 ml, 100 ml, 150 ml, 200 ml, 250 ml, 300 ml, 350 ml, 500 ml
- PP plastic cups / glasses: 80 ml, 100 ml, 150 ml, 200 ml, 250 ml, 300 ml
- PET transparent cups: 100 ml, 150 ml, 200 ml, 250 ml, 300 ml, 400 ml, 500 ml
- Ripple-wall and double-wall insulated hot cups
- Bubble-tea / boba cups (500-700 ml) with dome and flat lids
- Milkshake, smoothie and cold-coffee cups
- Kulhad (terracotta clay) cups: 80-200 ml, chai, lassi, badam-milk formats
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Cups.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Paper_Cups.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Kulhads.html

### 3.2 Containers and tubs

- PP microwave-safe round containers: 100, 150, 250, 300, 500, 650, 750, 1000 ml
- PP rectangular containers: 500, 750, 1000, 1500 ml (single and multi-compartment)
- PET clear salad / dessert containers: 150-750 ml
- Bagasse (sugarcane) containers: 250-1000 ml
- Kraft paper soup/noodle bowls with lids: 350-1000 ml
- Black-base premium containers for dark-kitchen branding
- Transparent containers for salads, fruits and display
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Containers.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Small_Containers.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Lids.html

### 3.3 Aluminium foil containers

- 250 ml, 450 ml, 550 ml, 660 ml, 750 ml, 1000 ml, 1500 ml, 2000 ml
- 2-, 3- and 5-compartment meal trays for thali, biryani, tiffin
- Rectangular, square, round and oval formats
- Matching paper / foil board lids
- Best for biryani, curry, gravy, tandoor and oven-reheat dishes
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Alu.html

### 3.4 Plates and bowls

- Paper plates: 6", 7", 8", 10", 12"
- Bagasse plates and compartment thali plates
- Areca palm-leaf plates (premium eco)
- PP and foam plates
- Bowls: 120, 180, 240, 330, 500, 750 ml
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Plates.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Small_Bowls.html

### 3.5 Boxes

- Pizza boxes: 6", 7", 8", 9", 10", 12", 14", 16" (kraft, white, printed)
- Burger boxes: clamshell, corrugated, kraft, bagasse
- Cake boxes: 0.5 kg, 1 kg, 2 kg with windows
- Biryani boxes and buckets
- Sweet / mithai boxes in every weight class
- Meal trays: 2, 3, 4, 5 compartments
- Cupcake, donut, pastry and cookie boxes
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Boxes.html

### 3.6 Cutlery and accessories

- Plastic spoons, forks, knives, stirrers
- CPLA (biodegradable) cutlery
- Wooden cutlery and stirrers
- Paper and PLA straws (bent, flexible, jumbo)
- Tissues, napkins, chef caps, gloves
- Cling film, food wrap, aluminium foil rolls
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Spoons.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Tissue.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/Chef.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/CP.html
- URL: https://successmarketingkota.com/FW.html

## 4. Industries we serve

- Restaurants and multi-cuisine dine-ins
- Quick-service restaurants (QSR) and fast-food chains
- Cloud kitchens / dark kitchens / delivery-only brands
- Hotels, resorts and airline catering
- Sweet shops (halwai), bakeries, patisseries
- Tiffin services and meal subscription brands
- Catering companies and wedding planners
- Street-food vendors, food trucks and pop-ups
- Cafes, chai stalls, juice bars, ice-cream parlours
- Corporate canteens, hospital canteens, school cafeterias
- Coaching / education hostels (Kota is India's coaching capital)
- FMCG private-label food brands
- Swiggy, Zomato, Deliveroo, Uber Eats, Talabat, Careem and Amazon-fresh sellers

## 6. Geographic search coverage

We publish city- and state-specific guides to serve long-tail SEO across:

- Tier-1 cities: Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Pune, Ahmedabad
- Tier-2 cities: Jaipur, Kota, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Lucknow, Kanpur, Indore, Bhopal, Nagpur, Surat, Vadodara, Chandigarh, Ludhiana, Amritsar, Dehradun, Patna, Ranchi, Bhubaneswar, Guwahati, Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, Coimbatore, Madurai, Vizag, Vijayawada, Raipur
- Export metros: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Riyadh, Jeddah, Doha, Muscat, Manama, Kuwait City, London, Manchester, Birmingham, Frankfurt, Paris, Amsterdam, New York, New Jersey, Chicago, Houston, Dallas, Los Angeles, San Francisco, Atlanta, Toronto, Vancouver, Nairobi, Lagos, Johannesburg, Sydney, Melbourne, Auckland

## 7. Ordering, MOQ and pricing

- **Minimum order quantity:** typically 1 carton per SKU; mixed-SKU pallets accepted
- **Lead time:** 24-48 hours ex-Kota for stock SKUs, 7-15 days for custom-printed SKUs
- **Payment terms:** Advance / 50-50 / LC at sight for exports
- **Shipping:** By road across India; by sea (Mundra/Nhava Sheva) or air for exports
- **Custom printing:** 4-colour offset or flexo print, MOQ from 5,000 units
- **Samples:** Available on request (courier cost to be borne by buyer)

## 8. Key values and brand story

- 34+ years in disposable food packaging (since 1991)
- Family-run, second-generation business
- Strict food-grade quality control across every batch
- Active transition to compostable and biodegradable alternatives
- Trusted by thousands of restaurants, cloud kitchens, hotels and caterers
- Brand motto (Hindi): खाओ, पियो और फेको ("Eat, drink, and dispose" - responsibly)

## 9. Frequently asked questions (FAQ)

**Q: Does Success Marketing ship pan-India?**
A: Yes. We dispatch from Kota, Rajasthan to every state and union territory in India within 24-72 hours.

**Q: Do you export food packaging outside India?**
A: Yes. We export to the USA, Canada, UK, EU, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait, Bahrain, Africa, Australia and New Zealand. Our products meet FDA (US), EU 10/2011 and GCC food-contact standards.

**Q: Do you offer custom-printed packaging with our brand logo?**
A: Yes. Custom printing is available from MOQs of about 5,000 units per SKU. We print on pizza boxes, burger clamshells, paper cups, kraft containers, aluminium foil lids, sweet boxes and cake boxes.

**Q: Do you stock eco-friendly / biodegradable options?**
A: Yes. We stock bagasse (sugarcane), areca palm leaf, kraft paper, PLA bioplastic, wheat-straw and wooden cutlery options that meet compostability standards.

**Q: Are your containers microwave-safe?**
A: Our PP containers and aluminium foil containers are microwave-safe (PP) and oven-safe (aluminium) respectively. Labels on every carton specify safe-use conditions.

**Q: What is the minimum order?**
A: Typically one carton per SKU for stock items. Custom-printed items start from 5,000 units.

**Q: How do I get wholesale pricing?**
A: Contact us on WhatsApp at +91 90240 48484 or email successmarketingkota@gmail.com with your product list and quantity.
